title: kopsia lapidilecta
intro: Kopsia lapidilecta, also known as the 'Rock Kopsia', is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is a type of evergreen shrub with fragrant flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds like alkaloids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Kopsia lapidilecta often involve drying and crushing the leaves, which can be used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
